## What

## Why

## Public API impact

- [ ] No public API changes
- [ ] Additive public API change (documented in CHANGELOG under Unreleased)
- [ ] Breaking public API change (Migration Guide updated, major version bump noted)

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] `dart format --set-exit-if-changed .` passes
- [ ] New/changed public API is documented
- [ ] Tests added or updated (feature tests / regression test for bug fixes)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## Unreleased`
